statement: The scheduler can start multiple running-batch workflows for the same batch without a lock, leading to repeated application of the same batch results.
rationale: runScheduler starts workflows for all running batches each poll when shouldRunAt passes, without setting an in-flight flag before starting.
keyAssumptions: Scheduler ticks can overlap with long-running workflow steps.
next_poll_at is not advanced until after polling completes.
validationCriteria: See multiple workflow runs targeting the same batch_id within a short time window.
Observe applyBatchResults executed more than once for same batch_ref.
critiquePoints: If shouldRunAt and poll interval prevent overlap, duplicates may be rare.
questions: Is there evidence of multiple running-batch workflows per batch in logs?
